name: restaurant managers processing 5–15 shifts/week tool
description: For restaurant managers processing 5–15 shifts/week, inefficient scheduling causes staff dissatisfaction and increased labor costs. We automate shift scheduling instead of manual scheduling and tracking.
problem_solved: Inefficient shift scheduling and overtime tracking
